query:
UPDATE inventory SET 
  pending_delivery = FLOOR(reserved_stock * 0.8),
  locked_capacity = CASE 
    WHEN product_name LIKE '%薄千张%' THEN 50
    WHEN product_name LIKE '%中厚千张%' THEN 30
    WHEN product_name LIKE '%厚千张%' THEN 20
    ELSE 10
  END,
  daily_idle_capacity = CASE 
    WHEN product_name LIKE '%薄千张%' THEN 200
    WHEN product_name LIKE '%中厚千张%' THEN 150
    WHEN product_name LIKE '%厚千张%' THEN 100
    ELSE 80
  END;

  locked_capacity = CASE 
    WHEN product_name LIKE '%薄千张%' THEN 50

    WHEN product_name LIKE '%中厚千张%' THEN 150
    WHEN product_name LIKE '%厚千张%' THEN 100
    ELSE 80
  END;
